name: @tagspaces/canvas-viewer
description: A TagSpaces extension for viewing JSON Canvas (.canvas) files.

scripts.build-libs: echo 'import { JSONCanvasViewer, Controls, Minimap, fetchCanvas, parser } from "json-canvas-viewer"; window.JSONCanvasViewer = JSONCanvasViewer; window.CanvasControls = Controls; window.CanvasMinimap = Minimap; window.fetchCanvas = fetchCanvas; window.canvasParser = parser;' | npx esbuild --bundle --outfile=libs/json-canvas-viewer.bundle.js --format=iife --global-name=CanvasViewerModule --platform=browser --target=es2020 --minify
